source.name: Philadelphia event source registry
source.attribution: Official source pages and configured public event feeds

events.title: Art Open Studio
events.description: Drop in and experiment with materials and process while creating a work of art!

events.title: Carousel
events.description: Take a spin on our glimmering carousel — a piece of history built over 100 years ago! Ride the intricately carved horses, rabbits, cats, pigs and goats or our stationary chariots. The carousel is wheelchair accessible, so everyone can enjoy. Full-day carousel passes are $5 for non-members; members ride free.
events.venue: Independence Blue Cross Carousel House, Main Level

events.title: Family Nature Program
events.description: Outdoor nature, ranger, garden, or recreation programming for families in Philadelphia.

events.title: Family Storytime
events.description: Stories, songs, and early-literacy activities for young children and caregivers in Philadelphia.

events.title: Makerspace Open Studio
events.description: Experiment with building, different materials, and new techniques as you create during our open-ended free play time in the Makerspace Studio.
events.venue: Albert M. Greenfield Makerspace, Lower Level

events.title: Pride Parade Art with Kah Yangni
events.description: Come together with other Museum visitors, volunteers, and artist Kah Yangni to paint murals and signs to prepare for the End of the Day Pride Parade.

events.title: Tot Spot: Toddler Tunes
events.description: Ages 3 and under: Sing and dance along to your toddler’s favorite tunes!

events.title: Rainbow Relay Race
events.description: Do you know what the colors stand for in the Progress Flag? Learn about each color and work together as a community to assemble the flag.

events.title: Bears & Beers with Victory Brewing
events.description: Enjoy a complementary beer sampling courtesy of Victory Brewing to celebrate the opening of Bear Country!

events.title: Morning Storytime
events.description: Join our educators as we read Families of a Feather: A Celebration of Family Diversity.

events.title: Storytime: A Home Again
events.description: Have you ever wondered if your walls could talk? Join us for a story where a house tells us about its first family moving to a new home and how it had to learn to let new love into its walls again.

events.title: Pride Concert with Ants on a Log featuring Drag Queen Eric Jaffe
events.description: Celebrate Pride with nationally-acclaimed family music duo Ants on a Log and award-winning Philly drag queen Eric Jaffe ! Sing and dance along to live music and interactive storytime, infused with joy, inclusion and family fun! Recommended for ages 3-10.

events.title: Parachute Pride Party
events.description: Pride is all about community, acceptance and love. Come together as a community and play some fun games with our giant parachute!

events.title: Art Workshop: Family Portraits
events.description: Families are all different and special in their own ways! Join us for a storytime in the Creative Arts Studio, then draw a pride portrait of your unique family.

events.title: Art Workshop: Pop Art Posters
events.description: In honor of Pride Month, we are painting colorful posters inspired by the work of artist and activist Keith Haring.

events.title: Makerspace Workshop: Pride Amplified
events.description: Celebrate Pride Month by exploring the power of sound, music, and self-expression! We’ll honor the contributions of audio engineer and activist Boden Sandstrom as we experiment with sound waves and play with fun music tech!
events.venue: Albert M. Greenfield Makerspace, Lower Level

events.title: Makerspace Workshop: Shimmer and Swirl
events.description: Celebrate Pride by creating your own sensory bottle. Shake, swirl, and enjoy a playful, shimmering creation that’s as unique and joyful as you are!
events.venue: Albert M. Greenfield Makerspace, Lower Level

events.title: Carousel
events.description: Take a spin on our glimmering carousel — a piece of history built over 100 years ago! Ride the intricately carved horses, rabbits, cats, pigs and goats or our stationary chariots. The carousel is wheelchair accessible, so everyone can enjoy. Full-day carousel passes are $5 for non-members; members ride free.
